title: task
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/frame.c:139-140 - On 32-bit systems, frame_len = LICHEN_FRAME_PAYLOAD_OFFSET(addr_len) + frame->payload_len + mic_len could overflow if frame->payload_len is attacker-controlled and extremely large (e.g., 0xFFFFFFF0). After overflow, frame_len could be small enough to pass the bounds checks at lines 142-147, leading to buffer overwrite. Impact is low because lichen_frame_write is a public API where callers control the frame struct - malicious input would be a caller bug. Defensive fix: check payload_len <= LICHEN_MAX_PAYLOAD before computing frame_len.
close_reason: Fixed: added LICHEN_MAX_PAYLOAD check before size_t arithmetic to prevent overflow on 32-bit systems
